series_metadata.series_description: Subsidy and grant files pertaining to programmatic and fiscal issues and correspondence.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain 5 years provided by audit by Auditor of State, then review by State Archives, then destroy nonhistorical records ; Paper: Retain 5 years provided by audit by Auditor of State, then review by State Archives, then destroy nonhistorical records, Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Wastepaper
